title: Serenity/JS Screenplay Pattern
permitted_uses: Acceptance testing approach for actor-based clinical workflows and domain-language tests.
claims_supported: Serenity/JS supports the Screenplay Pattern for user-centered automated acceptance tests.
The framework supports multiple test automation types including end-to-end, component, mobile, and API testing.
claims_not_supported: That Serenity/JS alone can simulate Quest 3 headset sensor behavior.
That all clinical psychometric validation can be automated.
